name: Suspicious CSharp or FSharp Interactive Console Execution
description: Detection of the execution of CSharp or FSharp interactive consoles (`csi.exe` or `fsi.exe`) by scripting utilities. This is a highly suspicious activity, as adversaries may use these consoles to execute code and bypass security defenses.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a suspicious process, **{image}**, was launched by a scripting utility, **{parent_image}**. This activity is a strong indicator of **Trusted Developer Utilities Proxy Execution** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1127**) where an adversary is attempting to bypass security controls by using a legitimate tool to execute malicious code. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the malicious process. The event occurred under the user **{user}**.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The name of the suspicious process ('csi.exe' or 'fsi.exe').

parameters.name: parent_image
parameters.description: The name of the parent scripting utility process.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
